query: .entity_set with(domain='apm', name='apm.service') | entity-call get_trace('apm', 'apm.trace.common')  | extend duration_ms = cast(duration as double) / 1000000, is_error = case when cast(statusCode as varchar) = '2' then 1 else 0 end |  stats span_count = count(1), error_span_count = sum(is_error), duration_ms = max(duration_ms) by traceId | sort duration_ms desc, error_span_count desc | project traceId, duration_ms, span_count, error_span_count | limit 5
